transcript.text: The story set will cover reusable controls, restaurant/category presentation, cart summaries, a portal modal, a form step, and an MSW-backed restaurant section. I’m editing the shared setup first so those stories can stay small.

I noticed the app doesn’t render date-dependent output, so I’m keeping the required dependency installed but removing date freezing from preview to match the setup rule about only using `mockdate` when it is needed.

content.text: I found a compact React/Vite app with Redux state, styled-components global styling, axios data hooks, and a generic `Portal` component. Next I’m reading the entry, provider/theme setup, API surface, and candidate story targets.

content.text: Discovery is enough to define the shared preview: stories need Redux, a router, styled-components theme/global CSS, MSW for the axios restaurant endpoint, and a `#modal` root. I’m checking a few prop surfaces now so the stories match real component usage instead of forcing local harnesses.

content.text: The story set will cover reusable controls, restaurant/category presentation, cart summaries, a portal modal, a form step, and an MSW-backed restaurant section. I’m editing the shared setup first so those stories can stay small.
